SEARCH
Package clientGui.navigation

Class MainNavigator

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
All Implemented Interfaces:
BaseController
Direct Known Subclasses:
BarcodeScannerController, BillController, CheckOutController, ForgetCodeController, GetTableController, LoginController, ManagerOptionsController, MonthlyReportsController, OrderUi_controller, PaymentController, RegisterEmployeeController, RegisterSubscriberController, ReportsController, ReservationController, RestaurantLoginController, SelectionController, SetEmployeePasswordController, SubscriberHistoryController, SubscriberLoginController, SubscriberManagementController, SubscriberOptionController, TableManagementController, UpdateOrder, UpdateProfileController, WaitingListController
public class MainNavigator extends Object implements BaseController
Base class for all controllers that handle screen navigation. Manages loading FXML screens, injecting dependencies (ClientUi), and handling stage transitions.

    • loadScreen

      public <T> T loadScreen(String fxmlPath, javafx.event.ActionEvent event, ClientUi c)
      Loads a new screen (FXML) into the current stage or a new one. Initializes the controller with the ClientUi instance and sets up listeners.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the controller
      Parameters:
      fxmlPath - The relative path to the FXML file (without .fxml extension)
      event - The event that triggered this navigation (used to find the current stage)
      c - The ClientUi instance
      Returns:
      The controller of the loaded screen

    • openPopup

      public <T> T openPopup(String fxmlPath, String title, ClientUi c)
      Opens a new popup window with the specified FXML.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the controller
      Parameters:
      fxmlPath - The relative path to the FXML file
      title - The title of the popup window
      c - The ClientUi instance
      Returns:
      The controller of the loaded popup
